vibe: Sicarios Cartel, Tactical, Underground Bunker, Elite Crime Syndicate, GTA-RP

layout.strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, technical, scanable) for the Dashboard. Tetris Grid (High visual impact, asymmetrical) for the Login/Landing page.
layout.spacing: Tight gaps (gap-4/gap-6) inside dashboard widgets. Generous padding (p-8/p-12) for outer layout containers.
layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (Max 2px to 4px) - keeping it sharp, tactical, and aggressive. Cardless look preferred for data grids.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white uppercase font-headings text-xl px-6 py-2 rounded-sm hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(220,38,38,0.5)]
buttons.discord: bg-[#5865F2] text-white uppercase font-headings text-xl px-6 py-3 rounded-sm flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-[#4752C4] transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary hover:bg-surface_elevated transition-colors

forms.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-border rounded-sm p-3 text-text_primary focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary transition-all w-full
forms.labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-text_secondary mb-2 block font-mono

tables.header: bg-surface_elevated text-text_secondary font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider p-3 border-y border-border

login_page.layout: Full-screen hero with background image overlay
elements: Heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80 to bg-black/60 gradient) so text is readable
Massive Typography (SICARIOS CARTEL) in Bebas Neue

dashboard_layout.structure: Sidebar + Main Content Area. Dark tactical UI.
dashboard_layout.sidebar: Fixed width, contains user profile info (Discord avatar), navigation links.

pontaj.description: Log daily hours. Time tracking table.
pontaj.ui_elements: Form to input hours. Data table listing member, date, hours. Mono-spaced fonts for numbers.

jafuri.ui_elements: Submission form. Grid of 'recent hits' using a gritty card layout. Highlight amounts in 'success' green or primary red.

loterie.description: Lottery winner, amount won, tickets sold.
loterie.ui_elements: Use secondary color (Cartel Gold) heavily here. Big stat numbers for 'Jackpot' and 'Tickets Sold'.

fonduri.description: Weekly total funds from robberies and lottery.
fonduri.ui_elements: Aggregated big metrics. Control room style dashboard widgets. High visual hierarchy for total amount.

rapoarte.ui_elements: Dense table view with filters. Strict grid structure.

login_background.description: A man counting money with a gun on the desk in a vintage, mafia-themed setting. Used for the initial Discord Login landing page with heavy dark overlay.

jafuri_header.description: Vintage safety deposit boxes. Can be used as a header graphic or card background for the Jafuri (Robberies) section.

loterie_header.description: Dark casino slot machine. Perfect for the Loterie header or background graphic.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every button, input, tab, or key element must have a data-testid. E.g., 'discord-login-btn', 'submit-pontaj-btn'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Text on dark backgrounds must be bright enough. Use drop shadows on text if placed directly over images without solid overlays.
accessibility_and_testing.hover_states: Must be visibly distinct. Red buttons get brighter, borders glow.

language: Romanian (RO) strictly for all UI text, labels, and placeholders.
